title: FedNow Customer Credit Transfer
description: FI-to-FI customer credit transfer via FedNow instant payments network. Transfers $2,500 from sender to receiver with full structured data.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pacs.008.001.08">
  <FIToFICstmrCdtTrf>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-20260528-CTR-001</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T09:30:00Z</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <SttlmInf>
        <SttlmMtd>CLRG</SttlmMtd>
      </SttlmInf>
    </GrpHdr>
    <CdtTrfTxInf>
      <PmtId>
        <InstrId>INSTR-20260528-001</InstrId>
        <EndToEndId>E2E-FNOW-2026052800001</EndToEndId>
        <TxId>TXN-FNOW-20260528-001</TxId>
        <UETR>eb6305c9-1f7a-4c3b-8a2d-5e9f1b3c7d4a</UETR>
      </PmtId>
      <IntrBkSttlmAmt Ccy="USD">2500.00</IntrBkSttlmAmt>
      <IntrBkSttlmDt>2026-05-28</IntrBkSttlmDt>
      <InstdAmt Ccy="USD">2500.00</InstdAmt>
      <ChrgBr>SHAR</ChrgBr>
      <Dbtr>
        <Nm>Alice Richardson</Nm>
        <PstlAdr>
          <StrtNm>1200 Market Street</StrtNm>
          <TwnNm>Philadelphia</TwnNm>
          <CtrySubDvsn>PA</CtrySubDvsn>
          <PstCd>19107</PstCd>
          <Ctry>US</Ctry>
        </PstlAdr>
      </Dbtr>
      <DbtrAcct>
        <Id><Othr><Id>445566778899</Id></Othr></Id>
      </DbtrAcct>
      <DbtrAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>CHASUS33</BICFI>
          <Nm>JPMorgan Chase Bank</Nm>
        </FinInstnId>
      </DbtrAgt>
      <CdtrAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>BOFAUS3N</BICFI>
          <Nm>Bank of America</Nm>
        </FinInstnId>
      </CdtrAgt>
      <Cdtr>
        <Nm>Bob Martinez</Nm>
        <PstlAdr>
          <StrtNm>500 Boylston Street</StrtNm>
          <TwnNm>Boston</TwnNm>
          <CtrySubDvsn>MA</CtrySubDvsn>
          <PstCd>02116</PstCd>
          <Ctry>US</Ctry>
        </PstlAdr>
      </Cdtr>
      <CdtrAcct>
        <Id><Othr><Id>112233445566</Id></Othr></Id>
      </CdtrAcct>
      <Purp>
        <Cd>SUPP</Cd>
      </Purp>
      <RmtInf>
        <Ustrd>Invoice INV-2026-0528 - Consulting Services May 2026</Ustrd>
      </RmtInf>
    </CdtTrfTxInf>
  </FIToFICstmrCdtTrf>
</Document>

title: FedNow Payment Accept (ACTC)
description: Payment status report confirming acceptance of a FedNow credit transfer by the receiving financial institution.

title: FedNow Payment Reject (RJCT)
description: Payment status report indicating rejection due to closed beneficiary account (AC04). Demonstrates mandatory StsRsnInf block.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pacs.002.001.10">
  <FIToFIPmtStsRpt>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-STS-20260528-002</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T10:15:00Z</CreDtTm>
    </GrpHdr>
    <TxInfAndSts>
      <OrgnlInstrId>INSTR-20260528-002</OrgnlInstrId>
      <OrgnlEndToEndId>E2E-FNOW-2026052800002</OrgnlEndToEndId>
      <OrgnlUETR>a1b2c3d4-5e6f-7a8b-9c0d-e1f2a3b4c5d6</OrgnlUETR>
      <TxSts>RJCT</TxSts>
      <StsRsnInf>
        <Rsn>
          <Cd>AC04</Cd>
        </Rsn>
        <AddtlInf>Account has been closed at receiving institution</AddtlInf>
      </StsRsnInf>
      <InstgAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>WFBIUS6S</BICFI>
        </FinInstnId>
      </InstgAgt>
      <InstdAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>CITIUS33</BICFI>
        </FinInstnId>
      </InstdAgt>
    </TxInfAndSts>
  </FIToFIPmtStsRpt>
</Document>

children.value: Account has been closed at receiving institution

title: SEPA Credit Transfer Initiation
description: Customer-to-bank payment initiation for a EUR 1,850 SEPA credit transfer from Germany to France. Demonstrates the pain.001 3-level hierarchy.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.03">
  <CstmrCdtTrfInitn>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>SEPA-INIT-20260528-001</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T08:00:00</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <CtrlSum>1850.00</CtrlSum>
      <InitgPty>
        <Nm>Müller Technologies GmbH</Nm>
        <Id>
          <OrgId>
            <Othr>
              <Id>DE123456789</Id>
              <SchmeNm>
                <Cd>CUST</Cd>
              </SchmeNm>
            </Othr>
          </OrgId>
        </Id>
      </InitgPty>
    </GrpHdr>
    <PmtInf>
      <PmtInfId>PMTINF-SEPA-001</PmtInfId>
      <PmtMtd>TRF</PmtMtd>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <CtrlSum>1850.00</CtrlSum>
      <PmtTpInf>
        <SvcLvl>
          <Cd>SEPA</Cd>
        </SvcLvl>
      </PmtTpInf>
      <ReqdExctnDt>2026-05-29</ReqdExctnDt>
      <Dbtr>
        <Nm>Müller Technologies GmbH</Nm>
        <PstlAdr>
          <Ctry>DE</Ctry>
          <AdrLine>Friedrichstrasse 100, 10117 Berlin</AdrLine>
        </PstlAdr>
      </Dbtr>
      <DbtrAcct>
        <Id>
          <IBAN>DE89370400440532013000</IBAN>
        </Id>
      </DbtrAcct>
      <DbtrAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BIC>COBADEFFXXX</BIC>
        </FinInstnId>
      </DbtrAgt>
      <ChrgBr>SLEV</ChrgBr>
      <CdtTrfTxInf>
        <PmtId>
          <EndToEndId>E2E-SEPA-2026052800001</EndToEndId>
        </PmtId>
        <Amt>
          <InstdAmt Ccy="EUR">1850.00</InstdAmt>
        </Amt>
        <CdtrAgt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BIC>BNPAFRPPXXX</BIC>
          </FinInstnId>
        </CdtrAgt>
        <Cdtr>
          <Nm>Dupont Solutions SAS</Nm>
          <PstlAdr>
            <Ctry>FR</Ctry>
            <AdrLine>15 Rue de Rivoli, 75001 Paris</AdrLine>
          </PstlAdr>
        </Cdtr>
        <CdtrAcct>
          <Id>
            <IBAN>FR7630006000011234567890189</IBAN>
          </Id>
        </CdtrAcct>
        <Purp>
          <Cd>SUPP</Cd>
        </Purp>
        <RmtInf>
          <Ustrd>Invoice FR-2026-0528 - Software License Q2 2026</Ustrd>
        </RmtInf>
      </CdtTrfTxInf>
    </PmtInf>
  </CstmrCdtTrfInitn>
</Document>

title: FedNow Payment Return
description: Return of a previously settled FedNow payment due to incorrect account number (AC01). Original amount $750 returned in full.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pacs.004.001.09">
  <PmtRtr>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-RTR-20260528-001</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T11:45:00Z</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <SttlmInf>
        <SttlmMtd>CLRG</SttlmMtd>
      </SttlmInf>
    </GrpHdr>
    <TxInf>
      <RtrId>RTR-FNOW-20260528-001</RtrId>
      <OrgnlEndToEndId>E2E-FNOW-2026052800003</OrgnlEndToEndId>
      <OrgnlUETR>c7d8e9f0-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f-7a8b9c0d1e2f</OrgnlUETR>
      <RtrdIntrBkSttlmAmt Ccy="USD">750.00</RtrdIntrBkSttlmAmt>
      <IntrBkSttlmDt>2026-05-28</IntrBkSttlmDt>
      <RtrRsnInf>
        <Rsn>
          <Cd>AC01</Cd>
        </Rsn>
        <AddtlInf>Incorrect account number - no matching account found</AddtlInf>
      </RtrRsnInf>
    </TxInf>
  </PmtRtr>
</Document>

children.value: Incorrect account number - no matching account found

title: Payment Status Request
description: FI requesting status of a previously submitted FedNow credit transfer that has not yet received a response.

title: FedNow Request for Payment (RFP)
description: Creditor-initiated request for payment through FedNow. A merchant requests $320 from a customer for an e-commerce order.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.013.001.07">
  <CdtrPmtActvtnReq>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-RFP-20260528-001</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T14:00:00Z</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <InitgPty>
        <Nm>TechStore Inc.</Nm>
      </InitgPty>
    </GrpHdr>
    <PmtInf>
      <PmtInfId>RFP-PMT-001</PmtInfId>
      <PmtMtd>TRF</PmtMtd>
      <ReqdExctnDt>
        <Dt>2026-05-28</Dt>
      </ReqdExctnDt>
      <XpryDt>
        <Dt>2026-05-29</Dt>
      </XpryDt>
      <Dbtr>
        <Nm>Carol Anderson</Nm>
      </Dbtr>
      <DbtrAcct>
        <Id><Othr><Id>998877665544</Id></Othr></Id>
      </DbtrAcct>
      <DbtrAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>USBANK1</BICFI>
        </FinInstnId>
      </DbtrAgt>
      <CdtTrfTxInf>
        <PmtId>
          <EndToEndId>E2E-RFP-2026052800001</EndToEndId>
        </PmtId>
        <Amt>
          <InstdAmt Ccy="USD">320.00</InstdAmt>
        </Amt>
        <CdtrAgt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BICFI>FNBOUS44</BICFI>
          </FinInstnId>
        </CdtrAgt>
        <Cdtr>
          <Nm>TechStore Inc.</Nm>
        </Cdtr>
        <CdtrAcct>
          <Id><Othr><Id>223344556677</Id></Othr></Id>
        </CdtrAcct>
        <RmtInf>
          <Ustrd>Order #TS-2026-05280 - Electronics Purchase</Ustrd>
        </RmtInf>
      </CdtTrfTxInf>
    </PmtInf>
  </CdtrPmtActvtnReq>
</Document>

title: SEPA Payment Cancellation Request
description: Request to cancel a previously submitted SEPA credit transfer due to duplicate payment. Uses camt.056 recall mechanism.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:camt.056.001.08">
  <FIToFIPmtCxlReq>
    <Assgnmt>
      <Id>CXLREQ-SEPA-20260528-001</Id>
      <Assgnr>
        <Agt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BICFI>COBADEFFXXX</BICFI>
          </FinInstnId>
        </Agt>
      </Assgnr>
      <Assgne>
        <Agt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BICFI>BNPAFRPPXXX</BICFI>
          </FinInstnId>
        </Agt>
      </Assgne>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T15:00:00Z</CreDtTm>
    </Assgnmt>
    <Undrlyg>
      <TxInf>
        <CxlId>CXL-20260528-001</CxlId>
        <OrgnlEndToEndId>E2E-SEPA-2026052800001</OrgnlEndToEndId>
        <OrgnlUETR>e5f6a7b8-9c0d-1e2f-3a4b-5c6d7e8f9a0b</OrgnlUETR>
        <OrgnlIntrBkSttlmAmt Ccy="EUR">1850.00</OrgnlIntrBkSttlmAmt>
        <OrgnlIntrBkSttlmDt>2026-05-28</OrgnlIntrBkSttlmDt>
        <CxlRsnInf>
          <Rsn>
            <Cd>DUPL</Cd>
          </Rsn>
          <AddtlInf>Duplicate payment - original sent via batch file in error</AddtlInf>
        </CxlRsnInf>
      </TxInf>
    </Undrlyg>
  </FIToFIPmtCxlReq>
</Document>

children.value: Duplicate payment - original sent via batch file in error
